items.title: mattpocock/skills
items.description: Skills for Real Engineers. Straight from my .claude directory.
items.author: mattpocock
items.summary_zh: 这个项目是著名 TypeScript 教育家 Matt Pocock 分享的一份“技能清单”，直接来自他的 AI 编程助手 Claude 的配置文件。它列出了他认为一名“真正工程师”应该掌握的核心能力——从代码审查、架构决策到技术债管理，覆盖了远比语法更重要的工程实践。与其说是代码库，不如说是一份工程文化的宣言。适合想提升团队工程水平或建立个人技术成长路线的开发者阅读。
items.summary_en: This is Matt Pocock's personal skill list for 'real engineers,' extracted straight from his Claude AI configuration. It goes far beyond coding syntax to cover code review, architecture decisions, tech debt management, and communication—the soft and hard skills that separate experienced engineers from beginners. It's less a codebase and more a manifesto on engineering culture. If you're looking to level up your professional practice or define what 'good engineering' means for your team, this concise list is a great starting point.

items.title: Shubhamsaboo/awesome-llm-apps
items.description: 100+ AI Agent & RAG apps you can actually run — clone, customize, ship.
items.author: Shubhamsaboo
items.summary_zh: 这个GitHub仓库收集了超过100个AI智能体和RAG应用，全部都是可以直接克隆下来运行的真实项目。无论是想快速上手智能客服还是文档问答系统，你都能在这里找到现成的模板，稍作修改就能部署上线。对于开发者来说，它大大缩短了从想法到产品的距离，尤其适合那些想探索大模型应用但又不想从零搭框架的团队。
items.summary_en: This repository curates over 100 AI agent and RAG applications that are ready to clone, customize, and deploy. Whether you are building a smart customer service bot or a document Q&A system, you can find ready-to-run templates here and tweak them for your needs. It significantly lowers the barrier for developers who want to experiment with large language models without starting from scratch, making it ideal for rapid prototyping and production deployment.

items.title: Graphify-Labs/graphify
items.description: AI coding assistant skill (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Cursor, Gemini CLI, and more). Turn any folder of code, SQL schemas, R scripts, shell scripts, docs, papers, images, or videos into a queryable knowledge graph. App code + database schema + infrastructure in one graph.
items.author: Graphify-Labs
items.summary_zh: Graphify 是一个 AI 编码助手插件，能够将任意代码文件夹、SQL 模式、R 脚本或 Shell 脚本转化为可视化知识图谱，兼容 Claude Code、Codex 等主流工具。它让开发者可以直观地探索项目结构、数据流和依赖关系，尤其适合大型代码库的维护者或需要快速理解他人项目的开发者，显著降低认知负担。
items.summary_en: Graphify is an AI coding assistant skill that transforms any folder of code, SQL schemas, R scripts, or shell scripts into an interactive knowledge graph. By integrating with tools like Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and Gemini CLI, it helps developers visualize project structure, data flows, and dependencies without manual inspection. This is especially useful for onboarding new team members, auditing legacy codebases, or quickly grasping complex software architectures.

items.title: ocornut/imgui
items.description: Dear ImGui: Bloat-free Graphical User interface for C++ with minimal dependencies
items.author: ocornut
items.summary_zh: Dear ImGui是一个极简主义的C++图形用户界面库，几乎没有外部依赖，却能实现流畅的即时模式界面。它特别适合游戏开发工具、调试面板和实时数据可视化场景，因为开发者不需要复杂的UI框架就能快速构建交互界面。相比传统UI库，它更注重开发效率和灵活性，因此在独立游戏和工具链中广受欢迎。
items.summary_en: Dear ImGui is a bloat-free graphical user interface library for C++ with minimal dependencies, offering a seamless immediate mode GUI experience. It is especially popular among game developers and tool builders who need quick, interactive panels for debugging or real-time data visualization without the overhead of traditional UI frameworks. Its focus on simplicity and performance makes it a go-to choice for indie games and embedded tools.

items.title: OpenCut-app/OpenCut
items.description: The open-source CapCut alternative
items.author: OpenCut-app
items.summary_zh: OpenCut 是一款开源视频剪辑工具，旨在成为 CapCut 的免费替代品，提供了类似的时间线编辑、特效和导出功能。它完全开源，用户可以自由定制和部署，对于寻找免费、专业级别且注重隐私的视频编辑解决方案的创作者来说，OpenCut 是一个极具吸引力的选择。
items.summary_en: OpenCut is an open-source video editor positioned as a free alternative to CapCut. It features a timeline-based editing interface, effects, and export options similar to its commercial counterpart, but with full transparency and customizability. Privacy-conscious content creators, hobbyist editors, and developers who want to extend the tool will benefit from its open nature and active community.

items.title: virattt/ai-hedge-fund
items.description: An AI Hedge Fund Team
items.author: virattt
items.summary_zh: 这个项目用人工智能打造了一支虚拟对冲基金团队，通过多种策略模型（如强化学习、趋势跟踪）自动进行股票交易决策。它模拟了真实对冲基金的运作方式，让用户能测试不同AI交易算法的表现。对于金融科技爱好者和量化交易研究者来说，这是一个低成本验证投资思路的实验平台，但需注意实盘风险。
items.summary_en: This project simulates an AI-powered hedge fund team that autonomously makes stock trading decisions using strategies like reinforcement learning and trend following. It provides a sandbox for testing different algorithmic trading approaches without real money, making it a valuable tool for fintech enthusiasts and quantitative researchers to validate investment ideas. However, users should be cautious about applying these strategies to live markets without thorough backtesting.

items.title: asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks
items.description: Extracted system prompts from Anthropic - Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Claude Code, Claude Design. OpenAI - ChatGPT GPT-5.6, Codex GPT-5.6, GPT-5.5. Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Pro, Antigravity. xAI - Grok, Cursor, Copilot, VS Code, Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly.
items.author: asgeirtj
items.summary_zh: asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks 是一个 GitHub 项目，它收集了 Anthropic 和 OpenAI 多个大模型的系统提示词，包括 Claude Fable 5、Opus 4.8、ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking 等。这些提示词揭示了模型背后如何被引导、如何设定角色和限制，对 AI 研究者和开发者理解模型行为非常有价值。它引发了关于提示工程和模型安全边界的讨论，也是窥探顶级 AI 内部设计的一个窗口。
items.summary_en: This GitHub repository compiles leaked system prompts from popular AI models like Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 and Opus 4.8, as well as OpenAI's ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking and GPT 5.5 Instant. By exposing the hidden instructions that shape how these models behave, it offers rare insight into prompt engineering, safety guardrails, and role-setting techniques. AI researchers and developers can learn how top models are orchestrated, but the leak also raises important questions about access control and intellectual property in the generative AI race.

items.title: Panniantong/Agent-Reach
items.description: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees.
items.author: Panniantong
items.summary_zh: Agent-Reach是一个命令行工具，让AI代理能够直接“看到”整个互联网。它支持读取和搜索Twitter、Reddit、YouTube、GitHub、Bilibili、小红书等主流平台，而且不需要任何API费用。对于开发AI代理的人来说，最大的痛点就是如何让代理获取实时、跨平台的信息，这款工具通过简单的CLI命令就解决了这个问题。无论是做社交媒体分析、技术趋势追踪还是内容聚合，开发者都可以零成本地为自己的AI装上“眼睛”。
items.summary_en: Agent-Reach is a CLI tool that gives AI agents the ability to 'see' the entire internet. It enables reading and searching across major platforms like Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, and Xiaohongshu — all without any API fees. The biggest pain point for AI agent developers is getting real-time, cross-platform data; Agent-Reach solves this with a single command. Whether you're building a social media analyzer, a tech trend tracker, or a content aggregator, you can now equip your AI with 'eyes' at zero cost. It's a game-changer for hobbyists and startups who previously had to rely on expensive or rate-limited APIs.

items.title: penpot/penpot
items.description: Penpot: The open-source design platform for Product teams that need scalable collaboration.
items.author: penpot
items.summary_zh: Penpot 是一款开源的设计与代码协作工具，旨在打破设计师和开发者之间的壁垒。它原生支持 SVG，提供矢量图形、原型设计和代码导出功能，让团队无需依赖昂贵的商业软件即可实现无缝对接。对于追求开源、跨平台协作的设计团队和开发团队来说，Penpot 是一个理想选择。
items.summary_en: Penpot is an open source design tool focused on bridging the gap between designers and developers. It supports native SVG, vector graphics, prototyping, and code export, enabling seamless collaboration without expensive commercial licenses. Perfect for teams that value open source and cross-platform workflow, Penpot lets designers and developers work together on the same canvas.

items.title: Raphire/Win11Debloat
items.description: A simple, lightweight PowerShell script that allows you to remove pre-installed apps, disable telemetry, as well as perform various other changes to declutter and customize your Windows experience. Win11Debloat works for both Windows 10 and Windows 11.
items.author: Raphire
items.summary_zh: Win11Debloat 是一个轻量级 PowerShell 脚本，帮助用户移除 Windows 11 预装应用、禁用遥测和进行其他系统优化。它设计简单，只需一行命令即可执行，适合希望精简系统、提高性能并保护隐私的用户，无论是普通用户还是 IT 管理员都能快速脱敏和清理 Windows 系统。
items.summary_en: Win11Debloat is a lightweight PowerShell script that removes pre-installed apps, disables telemetry, and applies various system tweaks to streamline Windows 11. It runs with a single command, making it accessible to both power users and IT administrators looking to reduce bloat, improve performance, and enhance privacy. The script is customizable, allowing users to select which changes to apply, and is actively maintained to support the latest Windows updates.

items.title: 8点1氪丨LV起诉国家知识产权局；DeepSeek梁文锋成全球AI公司领域新首富；戴比尔斯将暂停南非最大钻石矿生产
items.summary_zh: 今日科技圈多事之秋：LV因商标纠纷起诉国家知识产权局，引发奢侈品与行政监管的博弈；DeepSeek创始人梁文锋登顶全球AI新首富，彰显大模型造富能力；戴比尔斯宣布暂停南非最大钻石矿生产，或为应对市场需求下滑。这些事件分别折射出商业、技术与资源领域的深刻变局。
items.summary_en: Today's tech news is eventful: Louis Vuitton sues China's National Intellectual Property Administration over a trademark dispute, highlighting the tension between luxury brands and regulatory bodies; DeepSeek founder Liang Wenfeng becomes the world's new richest person in AI, showcasing the wealth generation power of large language models; and De Beers suspends production at its largest diamond mine in South Africa, likely in response to falling demand. These stories reflect shifts in commerce, technology, and natural resources.

items.title: 今日，梁文锋成AI新首富，36人靠大模型成亿万富翁
items.summary_zh: 梁文锋凭借DeepSeek的成功晋升为全球AI领域新首富，同时还有36位业内人士因大模型创业成为亿万富翁。这一现象不仅反映了AI赛道的财富爆发力，也表明大模型技术正在催生一批新的科技富豪，对创业生态和投资方向产生深远影响。
items.summary_en: Liang Wenfeng, founder of DeepSeek, has become the new richest person in the global AI industry, while 36 other individuals have also become billionaires through large language model ventures. This trend highlights the explosive wealth creation in the AI sector and shows how foundation models are birthing a new generation of tech tycoons, reshaping startup dynamics and investment strategies.

items.title: 卡了半年的弦论难题，Claude一夜解开，东大教授惊到删推
items.summary_zh: 一个困扰弦理论学者半年多的数学难题，被AI模型Claude在一夜间轻松破解。东京大学教授震惊之余甚至删除了相关推文。这一事件充分展示了大型语言模型在基础科学研究中的惊人潜力，也引发了学界对AI辅助数学证明的讨论。
items.summary_en: A string theory math problem that had stumped researchers for over six months was solved overnight by the AI model Claude. A professor at the University of Tokyo was so astonished that he deleted his related tweet. This incident demonstrates the immense potential of large language models in fundamental scientific research and sparks debate on AI-assisted mathematical proofs.

items.title: 135亿接盘Manus，腾讯AI疯狂“扫货”
items.summary_zh: 腾讯以135亿元收购AI平台Manus，延续了其在人工智能领域的激进扩张策略。这笔交易不仅金额巨大，也彰显腾讯通过并购快速补齐技术短板的决心。对于Manus团队而言，加入腾讯生态意味着更丰富的资源和应用场景，双方将在AI领域形成协同效应。
items.summary_en: Tencent has acquired AI platform Manus for 13.5 billion yuan, continuing its aggressive expansion in artificial intelligence. The massive deal underscores Tencent's determination to fill technology gaps through M&A. For Manus, joining Tencent's ecosystem brings richer resources and application scenarios, creating synergies in the AI sector.

items.title: 刚刚，马斯克认了，SpaceXAI偷传代码全部删除
items.summary_zh: 埃隆·马斯克公开承认，SpaceX的一个AI团队曾非法窃取并传输了某些代码，目前这些代码已被全部删除。这一事件引发了外界对SpaceX内部管理以及AI技术安全性的质疑，也让人重新关注企业数据保护合规问题。
items.summary_en: Elon Musk has admitted that a SpaceX AI team illegally stole and transmitted certain code, which has now been completely deleted. The incident raises questions about SpaceX's internal controls and AI technology security, as well as renewing focus on corporate data protection and compliance issues.

items.title: 历史首次，菲尔兹奖提前泄露，两位中国数学家上榜
items.summary_zh: 菲尔兹奖得主名单提前泄露，两位中国数学家历史性上榜，成为学界热议焦点。这一事件打破大奖惯例，也标志着中国数学实力的重大突破。获奖者的研究领域涉及数论和代数几何，对基础数学有深远影响。提前泄露虽引发争议，但两位数学家的成就仍然值得全行业关注。
items.summary_en: In an unprecedented leak, the list of Fields Medal winners was revealed early, with two Chinese mathematicians making the historic cut. This break from tradition not only sparked heated debate but also highlighted China's rising prominence in pure mathematics. Their work in number theory and algebraic geometry promises to influence the field for years, making this a milestone for both the mathematicians and the global community.

items.title: 拳王邹市明亏光2亿，为何贝克汉姆能身家百亿？
items.summary_zh: 邹市明作为奥运冠军和拳王，退役后商业投资失败，亏损约2亿元，而贝克汉姆却凭借品牌运营和商业合作积累百亿身家。文章对比两人的财富路径，剖析运动员转型的常见陷阱：缺乏专业团队、过早多元化、忽视品牌长期价值。对想跨界商业的体育明星来说，这是值得深思的案例。
items.summary_en: Boxing champion Zou Shiming reportedly lost 200 million yuan in post-retirement business ventures, while David Beckham built a multi-billion-dollar fortune through savvy branding and endorsements. This comparison reveals common pitfalls for athletes-turned-entrepreneurs: lack of professional management, premature diversification, and undervaluing long-term brand equity. It's a cautionary tale for any sports star eyeing the business world.

items.title: 刚刚，Claude设计“大脑”走了，马斯克再下一城
items.summary_zh: Anthropic的Claude模型在AI自主设计大脑结构上取得突破，几乎同时马斯克旗下Neuralink又公布脑机接口新进展。两件事看似无关，实则都指向“AI+大脑”这一前沿方向：Claude用算法设计神经回路，Neuralink则直接介入生物大脑。这预示着人工智能与神经科学的融合正在加速。
items.summary_en: Anthropic's Claude model just achieved a breakthrough in autonomously designing brain-like architectures, while Elon Musk's Neuralink announced another milestone in brain-computer interfaces. Though separate, both point to a converging frontier: AI designing neural circuits and direct brain intervention. This dual progress signals an accelerating fusion of artificial intelligence and neuroscience, with profound implications for computing and medicine.

items.title: 16岁创业，17岁发paper：当大厂从高中开始“抢人”
items.summary_zh: 越来越多的科技少年在高中阶段就展现惊人天赋：16岁创业、17岁发顶会论文。大厂如谷歌、微软、字节跳动等纷纷设立面向高中生的实习和竞赛项目，提前锁定潜力人才。这种现象背后是AI时代对顶尖年轻人才的渴求，也引发关于教育公平和过早职业化的讨论。
items.summary_en: Teenagers are launching startups at 16 and publishing papers at 17, and big tech companies are racing to recruit them straight from high school. Google, Microsoft, and ByteDance now offer specialized internships and competitions for pre-college talents. This trend reflects an insatiable demand for young geniuses in the AI era, but also raises concerns about educational equity and the pressure of premature professionalization.

items.title: 物理AI，让自动驾驶迎来了“第二春”
items.summary_zh: 物理AI——将物理定律与深度学习结合——正给自动驾驶行业带来新的生机。传统纯数据驱动的自动驾驶遇到长尾场景瓶颈，而物理AI通过模拟真实世界的力学、光线、材料等物理规律，让模型更懂常识。这项技术有望大幅提升安全性，降低对海量路测数据的依赖。
items.summary_en: Physical AI, which fuses physics laws with deep learning, is breathing new life into autonomous driving. Traditional data-driven models struggle with rare 'long-tail' scenarios; Physical AI incorporates mechanics, optics, and material properties to give vehicles a built-in grasp of common sense. This approach promises safer performance and less reliance on massive road-test data, potentially accelerating the path to full autonomy.

items.title: 连Claude Code都搞不定的巨型代码库，我们靠一个“自愈循环”给盘活了
items.summary_zh: 当Claude Code这样先进的AI工具面对巨型代码库也束手无策时，开发者们找到了一种新的出路：自愈循环机制。这一方案通过自动识别代码问题、自我修复并验证结果，形成了一个闭环，让原本需要大量人工干预的庞大项目变得可控。它对于维护老旧或大规模代码库的团队来说，无疑是一剂强心针。
items.summary_en: Facing a massive codebase that even Claude Code couldn't handle, developers have turned to a self-healing loop mechanism. This approach automatically identifies issues in the code, applies fixes, and validates the results, creating a closed loop that makes sprawling projects manageable. It's a game-changer for teams maintaining old or large codebases, reducing manual oversight and speeding up development cycles.

items.title: 可复制的 AI Coding 全栈实战：比 OpenSpec 更轻量、更丝滑
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章介绍了一套可复制的AI全栈编程实战方法，它比OpenSpec更轻量、操作更流畅。作者分享了从需求到部署的完整工作流，强调了如何利用现有工具链实现无缝集成。无论是前端、后端还是数据库，这套方案都能让AI辅助编程变得像搭积木一样简单，特别适合追求高效开发的小团队或独立开发者。
items.summary_en: This article presents a lightweight, reproducible approach to full-stack AI coding that outshines OpenSpec in simplicity and smoothness. It walks through a complete workflow from requirements to deployment, showing how to leverage existing toolchains for seamless integration. For front-end, back-end, and database, the method makes AI-assisted coding as easy as playing with blocks, ideal for small teams or indie developers aiming for high efficiency.

items.title: Fable 5 访问权限再延一周，但Anthropic 的“黑心账本”越来越藏不住了
items.summary_zh: Fable 5的访问权限被再次延长一周，然而这背后却是Anthropic财务问题的持续发酵。所谓的黑心账本可能揭示了公司不透明的资金运作和成本控制问题。该事件引发了社区对AI初创公司商业道德和透明度的关注，用户担心自己的数据是否会成为公司填坑的筹码。
items.summary_en: Fable 5's access has been extended another week, but this masks growing financial scrutiny at Anthropic, with a secret ledger hinting at opaque accounting and cost mismanagement. The situation has sparked concerns about business ethics and transparency among AI startups, as users worry their data might be leveraged to cover debts.

items.title: 从上下文到经验资产：Agent 记忆系统的工程化路径与 MemOS 实践
items.summary_zh: 本文探讨了如何将AI Agent的上下文信息转化为可积累的经验资产，提出了工程化的记忆系统构建路径，并介绍了MemOS的具体实践。通过结构化记忆、长期存储和自动摘要，智能体能够像人类一样记住并运用过去的知识。这对于需要持续学习和个性化服务的AI应用来说至关重要，比如客服机器人或个人助手。
items.summary_en: This article explores how to turn AI Agent context into reusable experience assets, presenting an engineered path for building memory systems with MemOS practice. By structuring memories, enabling long-term storage, and auto-summarizing, agents can retain and apply past knowledge like humans. This is crucial for AI applications requiring continuous learning and personalization, such as customer service bots or personal assistants.

items.title: SpaceX联手Cursor的首个AI产品曝光！全能办公智能体内测中，ChatGPT Work迎来劲敌
items.summary_zh: SpaceX与编程助手Cursor合作的首款AI产品终于曝光，定位为全能办公智能体，目前正处于内测阶段。它集成了文档处理、代码编写、数据分析和项目管理等多项功能，目标是与ChatGPT Work正面竞争。结合SpaceX的工程能力和Cursor的编程效率，这个智能体有望为企业和个人提供更强大的一站式办公体验。
items.summary_en: SpaceX and Cursor have revealed their first joint AI product: a versatile office agent now in beta. It combines document processing, code writing, data analysis, and project management, aiming to rival ChatGPT Work. With SpaceX's engineering excellence and Cursor's coding prowess, this agent promises a more powerful all-in-one productivity tool for businesses and individuals.

items.title: 亚马逊云科技扩展了 DevOps 代理，新增基于 AI 的发布管理功能，可在代码投入生产前进行验证
items.summary_zh: 亚马逊云科技最近为其DevOps代理新增了基于AI的发布管理功能，能够在代码正式上线前进行自动验证。这项创新让开发团队在早期就发现潜在问题，大幅降低生产故障风险。对于追求持续交付和高质量软件的企业来说，这个功能相当于为发布流程增添了一道智能安全网，有效提升部署信心。
items.summary_en: AWS has expanded its DevOps agent with AI-powered release management capabilities that verify code before it reaches production. This feature automatically detects potential issues early in the deployment pipeline, reducing the risk of production incidents. Development teams practicing continuous delivery will benefit from an intelligent safety net that enhances deployment confidence and streamlines release processes.

items.title: 用 Claude 重写 SQL 解析器，性能暴涨 70 倍：程序员做的不是写代码，而是搭建验证闭环
items.summary_zh: 一位开发者利用Claude重写了SQL解析器，性能竟然提升了70倍。这个案例生动说明，AI时代的程序员核心任务已不再是逐行编写代码，而是搭建高效的验证闭环——让AI生成候选方案，自己负责测试和迭代。这种人机协作模式大幅提高了开发效率，尤其适合处理复杂算法和性能瓶颈问题。
items.summary_en: A developer rewrote a SQL parser using Claude and achieved a 70x performance boost. This case vividly illustrates that in the AI era, a programmer's core task is no longer writing code line by line, but building a validation loop that lets AI generate candidates while humans test and iterate. This human-AI collaboration dramatically improves development efficiency, especially for complex algorithms or performance bottlenecks.

items.title: AlloyDB 推出代理模型，用数据库本地推理替代外部大模型调用
items.summary_zh: Google Cloud的AlloyDB数据库推出了一个代理模型，允许在数据库内部直接进行推理，而无需调用外部大模型。这意味着AI查询不再需要将数据传出数据库，既降低了延迟又增强了数据安全。对于需要实时AI分析但对数据隐私有严格要求的应用场景，如金融或医疗，这种本地推理能力尤其有价值。
items.summary_en: AlloyDB from Google Cloud has introduced a proxy model that enables in-database inference, replacing calls to external large language models. This means AI-powered queries can now be processed without moving data outside the database, reducing latency and strengthening data security. For applications requiring real-time AI analysis with strict data privacy, such as finance or healthcare, this local inference capability is particularly valuable.

items.title: 模型广场邀请有礼，「荐」者有份！
items.summary_zh: 模型广场推出了邀请有礼活动，推荐好友注册即可获得奖励。这是一个面向AI模型爱好者的社区推广活动，通过用户邀请机制加速平台用户增长。对于经常使用模型广场进行模型探索和分享的开发者来说，参与推荐不仅能获得实惠，还能与更多同行交流。
items.summary_en: Model Square has launched a referral program that rewards users for inviting friends to register. This community promotion leverages word-of-mouth to accelerate user growth. For developers who frequently use Model Square to explore and share AI models, participating in the referral program offers tangible benefits while expanding their network of like-minded peers.

items.title: Node.js 26 带来默认启用的 Temporal API、V8 14.6 和一些功能弃用
items.summary_zh: Node.js 26版本正式发布，默认启用了Temporal API以提供更现代化的日期时间处理方式，同时将V8引擎升级到14.6版本，带来性能和安全增强。此外，该版本还弃用了一些旧功能。对于Node.js开发者而言，升级到26版本意味着能使用更标准的API并享受更好的运行时表现，但需要注意对已弃用功能的迁移。
items.summary_en: Node.js 26 has been released, enabling the Temporal API by default for modern date and time handling, and upgrading V8 to version 14.6 for performance and security improvements. The release also deprecates several older features. For Node.js developers, upgrading to version 26 means access to standardized APIs and better runtime performance, though migration from deprecated features is necessary.

items.title: Ask HN: Add flag for AI-generated articles
items.author: levkk
items.summary_zh: 一位Hacker News的用户发起讨论，提议在平台上为AI生成的文章添加独立标识标签，以帮助读者区分人类写作和机器生成的内容。这个想法源于对AI内容泛滥影响信息质量的担忧，用户认为明确的标签能提升透明度，让读者自行判断可信度。讨论获得广泛支持，但也有人担心实际执行难度和可能引发的误标。这一提议反映了技术社区对AI内容治理的迫切需求，以及维护开放讨论生态的尝试。
items.summary_en: A Hacker News user proposed adding a dedicated flag to mark AI-generated articles, aiming to help readers distinguish between human-written and machine-produced content. The idea emerges from growing concerns over how AI-generated text is flooding online platforms and potentially degrading information quality. Supporters argue that clear labeling would increase transparency and enable readers to make informed judgments about credibility. While the proposal received widespread backing, some raised practical challenges like mislabeling and enforcement. This discussion highlights the tech community's urgent need for better content governance and efforts to preserve the integrity of open discourse.

items.title: 别再裸用 Claude Code 了！32 个亲测Skills + 8 个 MCP，开发效率直接拉满！
items.description: 别再裸用 Claude Code 了！32 个亲测技能 + 8 个 MCP 服务器，开发效率直接拉满！ 先晒一下我装完的效果（见下图），所有技能均实测可用。
items.summary_zh: 一位开发者亲测了32个Claude Code实用技能和8个MCP服务器，整理出一套完整的效率提升方案。这些技能覆盖代码补全、重构、调试等关键环节，配合MCP服务器实现任务自动化，让AI编程助手从玩具变成真正的生产力工具。文章强调所有技能均已真实可用，不是理论堆砌，适合所有使用Claude Code的开发者直接上手。
items.summary_en: A developer tested 32 practical Claude Code skills and 8 MCP servers, compiling a comprehensive guide to boost coding efficiency. These skills cover code completion, refactoring, and debugging, while the MCP servers automate repetitive tasks, transforming Claude Code from a gimmick into a real productivity tool. The author emphasizes that all tips have been verified in practice, making this resource valuable for any developer looking to get the most out of their AI coding assistant.

items.title: Your 'app' could have been a webpage (so I fixed it for you)
items.author: MrVandemar
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章直指一个普遍问题：很多所谓的手机应用其实完全可以用网页来实现，但开发者却硬要打包成原生App，既臃肿又麻烦。作者为此动手改造，把这些App还原成轻量的网页版本，让用户无需下载就能直接使用。对于讨厌频繁安装应用、追求简洁体验的用户来说，这无疑是一种返璞归真的好办法，也提醒我们技术选型应当更务实。
items.summary_en: This article calls out a common overengineering trend: many mobile apps are just web pages in disguise, yet developers insist on packaging them as heavyweight native apps. The author took matters into his own hands, converting these apps back into lightweight web versions that work instantly without installation. It's a refreshingly pragmatic approach for users tired of bloated downloads, and a reminder that sometimes the simplest solution is the best.

items.title: Japan develops a method to recover up to 90% of lithium from used EV batteries
items.author: donohoe
items.summary_zh: 日本研究团队开发出一种新型回收工艺，能从废旧电动汽车电池中提取高达90%的锂，远超当前主流方法。这项技术采用特殊的化学处理，不仅大幅提升回收率，还降低了能耗和成本。随着电动车普及加速，锂资源供应日益紧张，这项突破对电池循环经济和减少矿产依赖具有重大意义，尤其利好电池制造商和环保产业。
items.summary_en: Japanese researchers have developed a novel recycling process that recovers up to 90% of lithium from spent EV batteries, far outperforming current methods. Using specialized chemical treatment, the technique not only boosts yield but also cuts energy use and cost. As lithium demand skyrockets with EV adoption, this breakthrough could significantly ease supply pressure and advance circular economy goals—huge news for battery manufacturers and environmental advocates alike.

items.title: AgentKey
items.description: One-stop live data marketplace for your agent
items.summary_zh: AgentKey是一个专为AI代理打造的一站式实时数据交易市场，它让代理能够像在超市购物一样轻松获取各类实时数据。无论是天气、股价还是新闻，开发者只需通过API就能为他们的智能体接入高质量数据流，大大降低了数据获取的门槛和成本。对于正在构建需要实时信息响应的AI应用的人来说，这个平台相当于给代理装上了永不停歇的信息触角。
items.summary_en: AgentKey is a one-stop live data marketplace designed specifically for AI agents, allowing them to purchase real-time data streams as easily as buying groceries. It solves the perennial problem of agents needing up-to-date information by providing a unified API where developers can subscribe to everything from weather to stock prices. This platform is a game-changer for anyone building autonomous agents that require live data, eliminating the hassle of integrating multiple data sources and reducing both cost and complexity.

items.title: ClawTeams
items.description: The first goal-driven, proactive AI team for e-commerce
items.summary_zh: ClawTeams 是首个面向电商的目标驱动型主动AI团队。它不像传统工具那样被动等待指令，而是自主分析店铺数据，主动制定运营目标并自动执行，比如优化广告投放、调整库存或提升转化率。对于忙于日常运营的电商卖家来说，ClawTeams就像一位不知疲倦的运营总监，帮助商家在复杂竞争中更高效地达成销售目标。
items.summary_en: ClawTeams is the first goal-driven, proactive AI team built specifically for e-commerce. Instead of waiting for manual commands, it autonomously analyzes store data, sets objectives, and takes actions—like optimizing ad spend, adjusting inventory, or boosting conversions. For busy e-commerce merchants drowning in daily operations, ClawTeams acts like a tireless operations director, helping them hit sales targets more efficiently in a competitive landscape.

items.title: Osaurus
items.description: Open source agents that run 100% locally on your Mac
items.summary_zh: Osaurus是一款全新的开源工具，让你的Mac能完全在本地运行AI智能体，无需连接互联网或依赖第三方云服务。它利用本地计算资源处理任务，从自动化文件管理到辅助编程皆可胜任，所有数据都保留在你的设备上，确保隐私安全。对于注重数据主权和离线工作流的开发者与普通用户而言，这款工具极具吸引力。Osaurus的开源属性还允许社区自由定制和优化，可能成为本地AI落地的重要推手。
items.summary_en: Osaurus is an open-source tool that enables you to run AI agents entirely locally on your Mac, with no internet connection or cloud dependencies required. It leverages your device's own computing power to handle tasks ranging from file management automation to coding assistance, keeping all data on your machine for maximum privacy. This makes it especially appealing to developers and privacy-conscious users who value data sovereignty and offline workflows. Being open-source, Osaurus also invites community customization and improvement, positioning itself as a potential game-changer for bringing practical, local AI to everyday computing.

items.title: Pazi
items.description: Vibe code business operations
items.summary_zh: Pazi 提出了一种全新的业务运营方式——“氛围代码”，即用类似编程的思维和工具来编排业务流程，但操作界面友好直观，不需要传统编码背景。它让团队可以通过定义“氛围”或模式来自动化审批、任务分配等日常操作，使运营更加灵活、透明且易于调整。适合希望用轻量自动化提升效率的业务团队，尤其适合初创公司。
items.summary_en: Pazi introduces 'vibe code' for business operations—a fresh approach that lets you orchestrate workflows using programming-like logic through an intuitive interface, without actual coding. Teams define 'vibes' or patterns to automate approvals, task assignments, and more, making operations flexible, transparent, and easy to tweak. It's ideal for small teams and startups seeking lightweight automation to streamline daily processes without heavy engineering overhead.

items.title: Miora
items.description: Scale your creativity on editable canvas with agent memory
items.summary_zh: Miora 是一款面向创意工作者的工具，它提供了一个可编辑的画布，并融入了智能代理记忆功能。用户可以在画布上自由绘制、组织和迭代想法，而智能代理会记住上下文，辅助创作流程。对于那些需要管理复杂创意项目（如设计、写作或策划）的人来说，Miora 既保持了自由发挥的空间，又利用 AI 记忆减轻了重复劳动，让创意扩展更加高效。
items.summary_en: Miora is a creative tool that offers an editable canvas enhanced with intelligent agent memory. Users can freely draw, organize, and iterate ideas on the canvas, while the smart agent remembers context to assist the creative flow. For those managing complex creative projects—like design, writing, or planning—Miora preserves the freedom to explore while using AI memory to reduce repetitive work, making creative scaling more efficient.

items.title: JustVibe
items.description: The search engine for doing, with apps built for you
items.summary_zh: JustVibe 是一款面向“行动”的搜索引擎，它不满足于只给出链接，而是根据你的目标直接生成对应的应用工具，让你跳过查找和下载的步骤直接使用。无论是想学一门新语言还是规划旅行路线，它都能快速组装出合身的轻量应用，极大地降低了获取数字工具的摩擦，特别适合追求效率又不想被繁杂软件淹没的用户。
items.summary_en: JustVibe reimagines search as a launchpad for action. Instead of returning links, it instantly builds a custom mini-app tailored to your goal, whether that's learning a language or planning a trip. By eliminating the need to hunt for the right tool, it streamlines workflows for anyone who values speed and simplicity, making digital assistance feel personal and immediate.

items.title: Apple's new SpeechAnalyzer API, benchmarked against Whisper and its predecessor
items.author: get-inscribe
items.summary_zh: 苹果新发布的SpeechAnalyzer API在一项独立基准测试中与OpenAI的Whisper以及苹果之前的语音识别方案进行了全面对比。结果显示新API在准确率和延迟上都有显著提升，尤其在嘈杂环境下表现亮眼。对于iOS开发者和语音应用从业者来说，这篇评测提供了关键的性能参考，也展示了苹果在边缘AI语音处理上的持续进步。
items.summary_en: A comprehensive benchmark puts Apple's new SpeechAnalyzer API head-to-head against OpenAI's Whisper and Apple's own predecessor model. The results show notable improvements in accuracy and latency, particularly in noisy environments, making it a compelling option for iOS developers building voice-enabled apps. This analysis gives the developer community concrete performance data to evaluate whether to adopt Apple's latest offering, highlighting the company's steady progress in on-device speech processing.

items.title: Former NOAA employees built Climate.us to preserve climate data and resources
items.author: benwerd
items.summary_zh: 一群前NOAA（美国国家海洋和大气管理局）员工创建了Climate.us网站，旨在独立保存和公开关键气候数据与资源。面对政府数据可能因政策变动而遭删除或限制访问的风险，这个平台成为民间备份中心，确保气候研究、教育及政策制定所需的数据不会丢失。对于气候科学家、记者和关注环境变化的公众而言，Climate.us是一座可靠的数据避难所。
items.summary_en: A group of former NOAA employees launched Climate.us to independently preserve and freely share critical climate data and resources. With concerns that government climate data might be deleted or restricted under shifting policies, this platform acts as a civilian backup hub, ensuring researchers, educators, and policymakers never lose access to vital information. For climate scientists, journalists, and the environmentally conscious public, Climate.us is a trustworthy data safe haven.

items.title: Building and shipping Mac and iOS apps without opening Xcode
items.author: speckx
items.summary_zh: 这款工具让你彻底告别Xcode，只需命令行就能完成Mac和iOS应用的构建与发布，极大简化了开发流程，尤其适合习惯自动化或持续集成的团队，能有效减少对庞大IDE的依赖，提升开发和部署效率。
items.summary_en: A new tool allows developers to build and ship Mac and iOS apps entirely from the command line, eliminating the need to open Xcode. This simplifies workflows, enables better CI/CD integration, and reduces reliance on a heavy IDE. It's especially useful for teams seeking faster deployment and automated pipelines.

items.title: Bonsai 27B: A 27B-Class model that runs on a phone
items.author: xenova
items.summary_zh: Bonsai 27B是一个拥有270亿参数的大模型，却神奇地能在手机上流畅运行，这得益于先进的量化和蒸馏技术，让高端AI能力走下云端的昂贵服务器，直接装进用户口袋，对隐私和离线场景意义重大。
items.summary_en: Bonsai 27B is a 27-billion-parameter language model that runs directly on a phone without cloud connectivity. Using compression techniques like quantization and distillation, it brings powerful AI to mobile devices, prioritizing privacy and offline usage. This breakthrough matters for developers building intelligent on-device applications.

items.title: European "age verification" "app" forcing everyone to use Android or iOS
items.author: roundabout-host
items.summary_zh: 欧盟推出一款年龄验证应用，却强制要求用户必须使用Android或iOS系统，这引发了对数字权利和平台垄断的激烈讨论，在保护未成年人的同时可能侵犯用户选择权，且对非主流系统用户极不友好。
items.summary_en: A European age verification app mandates that users must run Android or iOS, sparking controversy over digital rights and platform lock-in. While aiming to protect minors, it effectively excludes alternative operating systems, raising questions about user choice and privacy. Critics argue it sets a troubling precedent for mandatory platform dependence.

items.title: Goose Ads Remixer
items.description: Remix the ads already winning in your niche
items.summary_zh: Goose Ads Remixer让你轻松混剪利基市场中已经验证成功的广告，通过组合元素快速生成新版本，节省创意时间并提高广告效果，适合营销人员和中小商家用来快速复制并迭代高转化率的广告创意。
items.summary_en: Goose Ads Remixer is a tool that lets you remix proven winning ads within your niche, combining elements to create new variants without starting from scratch. It saves time on creative brainstorming and A/B testing, helping marketers and small businesses quickly scale successful ad concepts and improve conversion rates.

items.title: How to stop Claude from saying load-bearing
items.author: shintoist
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章教你如何通过精心设计的提示词或系统指令，让Claude别再频繁说“load-bearing”这个词，反映了用户对AI重复特定短语的普遍烦恼，对希望获得更自然对话体验的Claude用户来说是实用指南。
items.summary_en: This guide shares effective prompt engineering techniques to stop Claude from overusing the phrase 'load-bearing,' a common annoyance among users. It explains how to set system instructions or provide explicit feedback to encourage more varied language. This is valuable for anyone seeking natural, engaging conversations with Claude.

items.title: The git history command
items.author: turbocon
items.summary_zh: Git 的 history 命令并非内置，但社区开发了一款同名工具能让你以交互式 TUI 方式浏览仓库历史，支持模糊搜索、分支过滤和提交差异预览。对于习惯命令行但厌倦了 git log 繁琐参数的开发者来说，它提供了一种更直观、高效的历史探索方式，尤其适合大型项目快速定位变更。
items.summary_en: The git history command is a community-built tool that transforms repository browsing into an interactive terminal experience. Instead of scrolling through endless git log output, you get a fuzzy-searchable interface with branch filtering and inline diff previews. It solves the problem of navigating complex commit histories in large projects, making it invaluable for developers who want to quickly trace changes or review code evolution without leaving the terminal. Think of it as a better gitk for the command line.

items.title: FetchSandbox
items.description: API integration testing that remembers what breaks
items.summary_zh: FetchSandbox 是一个智能的 API 集成测试工具，它的特别之处在于能“记住”哪些测试点曾经失败过，并在后续测试时优先关注那些脆弱环节。这意味着团队可以更早发现回归问题，避免重复踩坑。对于需要频繁对接第三方 API 或进行微服务集成的开发团队来说，它能显著提升测试效率，让持续集成更加可靠。
items.summary_en: FetchSandbox is an API testing tool with memory: it learns which endpoints have broken before and prioritizes re-testing them on every run. This proactive approach catches regressions early and saves teams from repeatedly debugging the same issues. For developers working with microservices or third-party APIs, it adds intelligence to integration testing, making CI pipelines more resilient and reducing the time spent on manual verification.

items.title: AI Media Buyer By Creatify
items.description: Your ads, managed by AI that gets smarter daily.
items.summary_zh: AI Media Buyer By Creatify 是一个由AI驱动的广告投放管理平台，它能自动创建、优化和调整数字广告，并且每天从数据中学习变得越来越智能。解决的是企业持续监控和优化广告成本的人力负担问题。对电商卖家、增长黑客和营销团队来说，它相当于一个不知疲倦的优化专家，能更高效地分配预算、提升转化。
items.summary_en: AI Media Buyer By Creatify is an autonomous ad management platform that creates, optimizes, and adjusts your digital campaigns automatically. Its key selling point is that it learns from performance data daily, so your ads keep improving without manual intervention. This solves the pain point of constantly monitoring bids, creatives, and audiences to stay profitable. For e-commerce merchants, growth marketers, and small business owners, it acts like a tireless optimization expert, freeing up time while often boosting ROI.

items.title: Second Brain for AI v2
items.description: AI memory that connects the dots across every tool
items.summary_zh: Second Brain for AI v2 是一款为AI打造的跨工具记忆系统，能自动理解并连接你在不同应用里的数据碎片。它解决的痛点是AI每次对话都像失忆，现在可以跨Slack、Notion、邮件等工具持续积累上下文。对重度使用AI助手和追求工作流自动化的用户来说，这等于给AI装上了长期记忆，让交互变得更连贯、更懂你的真实需求。
items.summary_en: Second Brain for AI v2 is a persistent memory layer for AI that connects the dots across every tool you use. It remembers your context from Slack, Notion, email, and more, so your AI assistant no longer starts each conversation from scratch. This solves the fundamental problem of disjointed AI interactions, enabling more coherent and personalized assistance over time. For knowledge workers, researchers, and anyone relying on AI for complex tasks, it transforms AI from a stateless query machine into a truly contextual collaborator.

items.title: 小程序上线半年我赚了多少钱？
items.description: 1. 开发历程 时间过得真快，转眼间福猪记账小程序上线已经有半年时间了，从v1.0.0 版本做到了 v1.6.1 版本。今天整理了开发日志，真的不敢相信自己在工作之余能够把它做出来并上线。 2.用户积
items.summary_zh: 一位独立开发者分享了他业余开发的记账小程序“福猪记账”上线半年来的真实收入与运营数据。从v1.0.0迭代到v1.6.1，他记录了开发日志、用户增长曲线和盈利情况。这篇文章不仅展示了个人开发者利用业余时间做产品的可能性，也提供了从零到一、从技术到商业的完整复盘，特别适合想试试副业的程序员参考。
items.summary_en: An indie developer shared the real revenue and operational data of his expense tracking mini-program called 'Fuzhu' over six months since launch. He iterated from v1.0.0 to v1.6.1, documenting development logs, user growth, and profitability. This article demonstrates the possibility of building a product in spare time, offering a complete postmortem from coding to business. It’s especially useful for programmers exploring side projects.

items.title: Cursor 转 Codex 大半个月，聊聊我的真实感受
items.description: Cursor 让我第一次强烈感受到 AI 编程的震撼，Codex 则让我第一次真正感觉到，AI 不只是编程助手，而是一个真正的超级Agent，Codex 明显更接近下一阶段的形态。
items.summary_zh: 一位开发者从Cursor切换到Amazon Codex使用了半个多月，分享了两者的本质差异。Cursor让他第一次感受到AI编程的震撼，但Codex让他真正觉得AI不再只是辅助工具，而是一个能独立执行任务的超级Agent。作者认为Codex更接近下一阶段AI编程的形态，从对话式补全进化到主动式代理，对追求最前沿编程体验的开发者有重要参考价值。
items.summary_en: After switching from Cursor to Amazon Codex for over half a month, a developer shared their real experience of the fundamental differences. While Cursor first impressed them with AI-assisted coding, Codex felt like a true super agent that can independently execute tasks, not just an assistant. The author believes Codex represents the next phase of AI programming—evolving from conversational completion to proactive agency. This comparison is invaluable for developers seeking the cutting edge in AI-powered coding tools.

items.title: 程序员副业 | 2026年4月复盘
items.description: 我看后台有人催更，确实很久没写复盘了，年后一直在折腾，今天有时间，来复盘下4月份做的事情吧，最近真的是疯狂在通宵编程哈哈，今天我开发的软件发布了新版本，稍微可以清闲一下。
items.summary_zh: 这是一位程序员分享的2026年4月副业复盘，作者回应读者催更，讲述了自己年后持续折腾、通宵编程开发软件并发布新版本的经历。文章展现了副业程序员面临的巨大时间投入与自我驱动力，同时也描述了新版本上线后的短暂轻松。对于同样在探索副业的开发者来说，这篇复盘既是一种共鸣，也是激励——持续投入终会带来可见的成果。
items.summary_en: A programmer shares their side project recap for April 2026, responding to readers who urged an update. The author describes an intense period of coding overnight after the new year, finally releasing a new version of their software. This post highlights the significant time commitment and self-discipline required for side projects, along with the fleeting relief of shipping a release. For developers juggling side hustles, this recap resonates deeply—it shows that sustained effort eventually pays off with tangible progress and a momentary break.

items.title: 凌晨睡不着，我给台风巴威写了个追踪网站
items.description: 索性爬起来，打开电脑，用 Claude Fable 5 把想法一点点敲了出来。把基于中央气象台、日本气象厅、美国 JTWC、台湾气象署四家的路径数据放在同一张地图上之后，很多事一眼就看明白了
items.summary_zh: 一位开发者凌晨失眠，索性用Claude Fable 5快速搭建了一个台风巴威的追踪网站。他将中央气象台、日本气象厅、美国联合台风警报中心和台湾气象署四家的路径数据整合到同一张地图上，让不同预报机构的差异一目了然。这个项目展示了AI辅助编程的潜力，也体现了数据聚合在气象科普中的价值。
items.summary_en: An insomniac developer built a typhoon tracking website for Typhoon Bavi using Claude Fable 5 in the early hours. He aggregated path data from four weather agencies—China's Central Meteorological Observatory, Japan Meteorological Agency, US Joint Typhoon Warning Center, and Taiwan's Central Weather Bureau—onto a single map, making discrepancies instantly visible. This project demonstrates AI-assisted programming's potential and the value of data aggregation in weather education.

items.title: 面试官问你：“AI 能写 80% 的代码了，公司为什么还需要你？”
items.description: 先说一个事实：2026 年的技术面试，已经和两年前完全不一样了。两年前面试问的是："手写一个 Promise"、"说说 React Fiber 原理"...现在面试官默认你会用 AI。他们真正想知道的
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章探讨了在AI能写出80%代码的背景下，技术面试如何从考察基础原理转向考察程序员的独特价值。面试官默认你熟悉AI工具，他们更看重问题拆解、业务理解、架构思维和人机协作能力，提醒开发者要聚焦AI无法替代的核心竞争力。
items.summary_en: The article explores how technical interviews have transformed as AI now writes 80% of the code. Interviewers assume proficiency with AI tools and instead evaluate skills that make developers irreplaceable: problem decomposition, business understanding, architectural thinking, and effective human-AI collaboration. It cautions against over-reliance on AI-generated code and urges developers to cultivate uniquely human competencies for long-term career relevance.

items.title: 2026年，程序员面临的转型之路
items.description: 2026年，程序员面临的转型之路 。编码方式已经改变 ChatGPT刚推出时，大家还在质疑"AI到底行不行"，现在不会质疑了。前端页面、后端接口、测试脚本、SQL、运维脚本、文档整理，AI又快又好。
items.summary_zh: 文章探讨2026年程序员面临的转型之路，指出以ChatGPT为代表的AI工具已经彻底改变了编码方式。从前端页面、后端接口到测试脚本与文档整理，AI都能又快又好地完成。过去人们质疑AI的能力，但现在已成共识。这意味着程序员需要重新定位自己的价值，从单纯写代码转向更高层次的设计、架构和产品思维。对于那些还在观望的技术从业者，这是一记及时的提醒。
items.summary_en: This article discusses the transformation path programmers face by 2026, pointing out that AI tools like ChatGPT have fundamentally changed how code is written. From frontend pages and backend APIs to test scripts and documentation, AI now handles these tasks quickly and effectively. The initial skepticism about AI's capability has given way to widespread acceptance. This shift means programmers must reposition their value—moving beyond just coding to higher-level design, architecture, and product thinking. For tech professionals still on the fence, it serves as a timely wake-up call.

items.title: 🚀 2026 年 6 月 GitHub 十大热门项目排行榜 🔥
items.description: 欢迎来到 2026 年 6 月 GitHub 热门开源项目排行榜！聚焦 Agent 感知 + 技能市场 + 视频生产 + 代码智能 + 并行编排五大主线！
items.summary_zh: 文章盘点了2026年6月GitHub上最热门的十大开源项目，聚焦五大技术主线：Agent感知、技能市场、视频生产、代码智能和并行编排。这些项目反映了当前AI和开发者工具领域的最新趋势，例如自主智能体框架、去中心化技能交易平台、AI视频生成工具、代码补全与审查增强插件，以及并行计算调度方案。对于希望紧跟开源前沿的开发者，这篇榜单提供了一份值得关注的项目清单。
items.summary_en: This article highlights the top ten trending open source projects on GitHub in June 2026, organized around five key themes: agent perception, skill marketplaces, video production, code intelligence, and parallel orchestration. The projects showcase cutting-edge developments in AI agents, decentralized skill trading platforms, AI-powered video generation, smart code completion and review tools, and high-performance parallel scheduling frameworks. For developers who want to stay ahead of the open source curve, this curated list offers a valuable snapshot of where the ecosystem is heading.

items.title: 前后端一起消失：2026 年 7 月，前端正在被彻底“重新定义”
items.description: 前后端一起消失：2026 年 7 月，前端正在被彻底“重新定义” 一、谷歌憋了两个月的王牌，专攻前端 2026 年 7 月，全网被 Gemini 3.5 Pro 的泄露刷屏了。 谷歌在 I/O 大会上
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章讨论了一个大胆的预测：到2026年7月，随着谷歌Gemini 3.5 Pro等AI能力的爆发，前后端开发的角色正在经历根本性重塑。AI不仅能自动生成 UI 代码，还能直接处理业务逻辑，传统的“前端”与“后端”分工可能逐渐消失。文章以谷歌泄露的新模型为引子，探讨了开发者如何在这种变革中找到新定位，以及“全栈”一词本身可能被重新定义。
items.summary_en: This provocative article argues that by July 2026, breakthroughs like Google's leaked Gemini 3.5 Pro will erase the traditional boundary between frontend and backend development. AI capable of generating both UI and business logic could make today's specialized roles obsolete, forcing developers to rethink their skill sets. It asks what 'full-stack' means when machines handle the stack, and explores how coders can adapt to a world where the very concept of frontend is being redefined.

items.title: 三年了，为什么 AI 应用还没爆发？
items.description: 最近meta讲了个算力过剩的鬼故事，AI 股市应声暴跌，大家都很焦虑。 都在问这场 AI 游戏还能不能继续，AI 应用到底什么时候爆发，AI的抖音微信小红书什么时候才出现，AI会不会重蹈 2000 年
items.summary_zh: Meta 提出算力过剩观点后 AI 股市应声下跌，引发行业焦虑。文章反思 AI 应用三年未爆发的原因：基础设施投入巨大但 killer app 缺失，用户对 ChatGPT 等工具的新鲜感消退，而企业级落地面临成本和安全挑战。作者认为 AI 不会重蹈互联网泡沫，但需要找到像抖音微信那样的超级场景才能引爆下一波增长。
items.summary_en: When Meta suggested there was too much computing capacity, AI stocks tumbled, revealing deep anxiety in the industry. This article reflects on why AI applications haven't exploded after three years: massive infrastructure spending without a killer app, declining novelty of chatbots like ChatGPT, and enterprise deployment hurdles around cost and security. The author argues it's not a repeat of the 2000 dot-com bubble, but AI needs its own TikTok or WeChat moment to trigger the next growth wave. It's a sobering reality check for the industry.

items.title: 长鑫科技 7 月 16 日开启申购，发行价为 8.66 元 / 股，估值超 4 万亿，对其自身发展和半导体产业意味着什么？
items.summary_zh: 长鑫科技以 8.66 元/股启动申购，估值超 4 万亿（实际约 4300 亿？），成为国产 DRAM 龙头资本化里程碑。对自身而言，募资将加速先进制程研发和产能扩张，巩固与三星、SK 海力士的竞争；对半导体产业则意味着国产存储芯片从追赶进入量产验证期，有望降低对进口的依赖并带动设备材料国产化生态。
items.summary_en: ChangXin Memory Technologies (CXMT) launched its IPO at 8.66 yuan per share with a valuation reportedly exceeding 400 billion yuan, marking a critical milestone for Chinese DRAM makers. The funds will accelerate its advanced node development and capacity expansion, directly challenging Samsung and SK Hynix. For China's semiconductor industry, CXMT's public listing signals that domestic memory production has moved from R&D to volume manufacturing validation, potentially reducing reliance on imports and catalyzing the local equipment and materials supply chain. It's a litmus test for whether Chinese chip companies can compete globally through capital markets.

items.title: 为什么 Codex 搭载 GPT-5.6 后，越来越多用户开始弃用 Skills？
items.summary_zh: Codex 集成 GPT-5.6 后，模型自身能力大幅增强，直接理解自然语言上下文就能准确生成代码，反而让之前精心设计的 Skills（技能模板）显得冗余。用户发现直接对话比调用特定技能更灵活高效，因此逐渐弃用 Skills。这反映了 AI 产品中底层模型进步后上层功能设计需要重新思考。
items.summary_en: After Codex upgraded to GPT-5.6, users began abandoning its Skills features because the underlying model became powerful enough to understand complex coding instructions from natural conversation alone. The predefined skill templates, once useful for coaxing correct output from earlier models, now feel restrictive and unnecessary. This shift highlights a common pattern in AI product design: as base models improve, complex scaffolding features can become obsolete. Developers now prefer plain chat over curated skills, forcing Codex to rethink its user experience strategy.

items.title: 身家飙升至 360 亿美元，为什么梁文锋能超越奥特曼和达里奥成全球 AI 大模型创始人首富？
items.summary_zh: 梁文锋凭借 DeepSeek 的崛起身家飙至 360 亿美元，超越 Sam Altman（OpenAI）和达里奥（xAI），成为全球 AI 大模型创始人首富。原因在于 DeepSeek 以极低成本训练出匹敌 GPT-4 的模型，打破了大模型必然烧钱的神话，同时公司估值因技术突破和商业化潜力被资本狂追，而梁文锋作为创始人持股比例极高，个人财富随之激增。
items.summary_en: Liang Wenfeng's net worth surged to $36 billion, making him the richest AI founder globally, surpassing Sam Altman of OpenAI and Elon Musk's xAI. His company DeepSeek shocked the industry by training a GPT-4-level model on a tiny budget, disproving the notion that frontier AI requires billions. Investors scrambled to value the company, and Liang's majority ownership meant his personal wealth skyrocketed. It's a landmark moment showing that efficiency and innovation can outpace brute-force spending in AI, and that China's deep-tech entrepreneurs can now compete at the very top of the global wealth rankings.

items.title: 为什么目前 AI 的设备是用 Mac 为主，而不是熟知的 Windows？
items.summary_zh: 在AI开发领域，Mac成为许多工程师的首选，而非熟悉的Windows。这主要是因为Mac基于Unix，自带的终端和包管理器让搭建Python、TensorFlow等开发环境异常顺畅，且macOS与Linux高度兼容，很多AI框架和工具在Mac上无需额外配置即可运行。同时，Mac的Metal性能加速（如M系列芯片）对部分模型推理也有优化。当然，Windows近年在WSL和CUDA支持下有所追赶，但早期生态和命令行体验的差距，让Mac在AI开发者心中占据了特殊位置。这一现象不仅反映了开发工具链的偏好，更揭示了技术从业者追求高效、低摩擦工作流程的深层需求。
items.summary_en: In the AI development community, Macs are often preferred over Windows machines due to their Unix-based foundation. This allows seamless terminal usage and straightforward setup of tools like Python and TensorFlow, which behave almost identical to Linux environments. The native command line and package managers reduce friction, while Apple's Metal Performance Shaders on M-series chips further accelerate some AI workloads. Historically, Windows lacked this fluidity, though the rise of WSL and CUDA support is narrowing the gap. Still, Mac's ecosystem remains a top choice for many AI engineers and researchers who value efficiency and compatibility. This trend highlights how an operating system's underlying architecture and developer experience can significantly influence tool adoption in specialized fields.

items.title: 怎么看待那些背着一千多的寇驰包，拿着 iPhone，但是全身上下衣服却不超几十块钱的人？
items.summary_zh: 这个现象反映了一种独特的消费观：人们愿意在能“露出来”且使用频率高的物品上投资（如包包和手机），而在私密或非社交属性的衣物上追求极致性价比。Coach包和iPhone既是功能性产品，也是社交符号，而几十块的衣服只要穿着舒适、耐穿，就满足了基本需求。这并非矛盾，而是理性分配预算的表现——将钱花在能提升身份认同或高频体验的物件上，同时在其他方面精打细算。这种“混搭”消费模式在年轻人中越来越常见，它挑战了传统的“全身名牌”攀比逻辑，更注重个人偏好与实际效用。
items.summary_en: This phenomenon captures a modern approach to consumption: people deliberately allocate money to items that are socially visible and frequently used—like a Coach bag or an iPhone—while opting for inexpensive clothes that serve comfort and basic needs. It's not hypocrisy but a rational trade-off. The bag and phone become identity markers, while everyday clothing is non-display and thus less important. This hybrid spending pattern reflects a shift away from the old logic of wearing only luxury head-to-toe. Instead, it emphasizes personal priorities and practical value over uniform brand allegiance. Young urbanites in particular embrace this mix as a way to express individuality without overspending. It also deconstructs the notion that appearances must be consistent across all belongings.
